programme.title: NFL 360
programme.sub-title: The Indelible Legacy of Jimmy Raye
programme.desc: In the 1960s, with Black athletes facing rampant prejudice and the perception that they were incapable of playing quarterback, Jimmy Raye follows Coach Duffy Daugherty's Underground Railroad to Michigan State.

programme.title: Shallow Water
programme.desc: The day after Super Bowl LVIII, the NFL named Queen Tahj Williams as the official designer of Super Bowl LIX's logo.

programme.title: The Godfather vs. The Gunslinger

programme.desc: Giants legend Osi Umenyiora leads NFL stars of African descent home to reconnect with their roots and mentor the next generation of athletes.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The pressure of competition begins to wear down one competitor, and great play is attributed to luck.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: An already tense situation and questionable etiquette leads to one competitor's exile from the group.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The tension boils over, and one competitor is specifically targeted for elimination.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The final four is set, and a long awaited face-off brings out the best and worst of the competitors.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Three compete, but only two will move on to play for the ultimate prize.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Finalists compete in 18 holes of match play to determine the winner.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy and Piers want to get the most out of the driver. They demonstrate what the pros look like at impact and share what to do to get into that position.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy Proudman and Piers Ward cover all things long game from fairway metals to hybrids and even how to master the dreaded long irons. They also teach how finding the low point in the swing helps create consistent strikes.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy Proudman and Piers Ward explain the big three in iron play: how to control distance, accuracy, and trajectory on shots. They also show a footwork drill to help ball striking and what to do to work the ball into those tucked pins.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy Proudman and Piers Ward explain how to dial in distances with short irons and how to hit them on line every time; they also explain the bounce angle and how to choose the right amount.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy and Piers show how to play a variety of shots around the green, including the high spinning chip, low runner, and many more. They also explain the importance of focusing on a landing zone when hitting greenside shots.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy and Piers explain the necessary fundamentals to hit effective greenside and fairway bunker shots. They also explain how to hit it close from one of the most feared shots in the game, the 30-40-yard bunker shot.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Me and My Golf's Andy and Piers explain how to master judging speed and reads on the greens. They also demonstrate the proper mechanics for hitting it solid and making those clutch putts.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy and Piers explain how to master different lies on the course, featuring the buried lie, sitting up lie, and flyer lie.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy and Piers explain that the best play isn't always the hero shot. They demonstrate how save strokes by hitting over, under, and around trouble.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy and Piers explain how to save strokes by thinking around the course; they'll demonstrate how to take advantage of both sides of the tee-box and the importance of a good pre-shot routine.

programme.title: Big Break: Where Are They Now?
programme.sub-title: Don Donatello & Stefanie Kenoyer; Al Del Greco
programme.desc: Don Donatello earned notoriety for his outbursts and antics, but quickly became heralded as a gritty competitor. Appearances on Big Break IV U.S. vs. Europe and Big Break Reunion solidified Donatello as legendary.

programme.title: Big Break: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: We catch up with former Big Break competitors Isaac Sanchez and Chad Pfeifer.Sanchez, who goes by the nickname "Sasquatch," is in actuality a gentle giant. But that didn't stop the competitor in him from creating some mythical moments.

programme.title: Big Break: Where Are They Now?
programme.sub-title: Mallory Blackwelder, Julien Trudeau & Robbie Biershenk
programme.desc: They began as members of opposite teams on Big Break Ireland; Mallory Blackwelder and Julien Trudeau ended as the series' first married couple; in between, Mallory was a standout on Big Break NFL for Team Brown; meet the rest of their new team.

programme.title: Big Break: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Sara Brown graced Golf Channel screens with strong runs at Big Break Sandals and Big Break Dominican Republic; she is running a family, occasionally herding preschoolers and being the ultimate team mom for her husband’s other successful squad.

programme.title: Big Break: Where Are They Now?
programme.sub-title: Don Donatello & Stefanie Kenoyer; Al Del Greco
programme.desc: Don Donatello earned notoriety for his outbursts and antics, but quickly became heralded as a gritty competitor. Appearances on Big Break IV U.S. vs. Europe and Big Break Reunion solidified Donatello as legendary.

programme.title: Better Off with Hally Leadbetter
programme.desc: What an alternate golf universe looks like; troubles lefties face in golf; a new product that could be the next big thing in golf.

programme.title: Better Off with Hally Leadbetter
programme.desc: A Pee.S.A that takes on cheaters in charity golf scrambles; how surfers and skateboarders are changing golf.

programme.title: Better Off with Hally Leadbetter
programme.desc: Hally talks to Stephen Curry, Ray Romano, Tony Romo, and Charles Barkley to get advice at the American Century Championship in Lake Tahoe.

programme.title: Better Off with Hally Leadbetter
programme.desc: Hally is haunted by an apparition; Emilia Migliaccio's decision to join golf media rather than turn pro.

programme.title: Better Off with Hally Leadbetter
programme.desc: What an alternate golf universe looks like; troubles lefties face in golf; a new product that could be the next big thing in golf.

programme.title: Build a Better Game
programme.desc: Debbie Doniger is here to go through the checkpoints of the golf swing -- from the setup to the top of the backswing. She's got individualized tips and drills for each position to help golfers play their best golf and own their swing.

programme.title: Build a Better Game
programme.desc: Debbie Doniger is back to go through the rest of the checkpoints of the swing -- from the transition through impact. Plus, with this newfound knowledge, she'll help put all of the checkpoints together to have golfers swinging their best in no time.

programme.title: Build a Better Game: Head to Toe With Martin Hall
programme.sub-title: Build a Better Game: Head to Toe With Martin Hall
programme.desc: The feet are pivotal in the swing for balance and proper weight shift; Martin explains how the feet should sequence during the swing and offers drills for proper movement and balance.

programme.title: Build a Better Game: Head to Toe With Martin Hall
programme.sub-title: Build a Better Game: Head to Toe With Martin Hall
programme.desc: Martin shows how the knees should flex and straighten throughout the swing to maintain power and balance.

programme.title: GolfPass Top Tips
programme.desc: The top tips from the world's best teacher have been compiled to make you a better ball striker; Nathalie Sheehan reveals how to eliminate fat contact, Chris Como teaches his Statue of Liberty Drill and Martin Hall goes in-depth.
